---
id: disable-mfa
title: "Disable TOTP"
description: "Disables TOTP-based two-factor authentication. Invalidates all previous sessions upon success."
sidebar_label: "Disable TOTP"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Disable TOTP"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/v2/user/mfa/totp"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Disables TOTP-based two-factor authentication. Invalidates all previous sessions upon success.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
